free_text: Beam cycled every 30 min through cycle normal,
parallel planes oriented perpendicular to the neutron
flux: 3 liquid scintillator tanks (BC-517s), and a 4th
set of 10 plastic scintillators (BC-408). Thin plastic
scintillators in front and between front and back
pairs of neutron detectors are used to tag charged
particles. In polarization mode, the front pair of
liquid scintillator planes also serve as neutron
Beam polarization measured using two beam-
line polarimeters, each having four arms of collimated
Systematic uncertainty of beam polarization about 0.01;
